decision: Wave 0.5 Foundation Hardening inserted as prerequisite wave before Wave 4
rationale: 360° technical audit surfaced naming convention violations, missing event-sourced state, no docs reading order, and no CI enforcement for artifact conventions — all must be resolved before Wave 4 can begin

decision: EVENT-LOG.jsonl as append-only source of truth with STATE.md as materialized view
rationale: SOTA LLM memory architecture: episodic log (event stream) + procedural view (STATE.md) + semantic layer (agents/skills). Enables full state reconstruction on fresh install by replaying events. Same pattern as Redux/Kafka/EventStore.
